name: Weird Meese
short_description: An exploration game about photographing strange moose. Wander through the last moose civilization and take pictures of its inhabitants to help out moose and humans. As you photograph, you will discover the sinister plot lurking in the moose town.
detailed_description:
What is this game?

This game is a first person exploration game about finding moose to photograph based on certain requests. Explore 3 areas filled with silly moose who are trying to imitate a human society. Unravel a story which follows helping the town and stopping an evil cult!

fulfill photo requests from letters you receive in the mail, and from conversations with the moose of the town! finish those requests by speaking with other moose and in the end, photographing moose to show to the request giver. Win over the approval of the moose and help your brother, who has sent you to the town to take photos to help him research moose.

THIS IS A SHORT GAME
!!This game will probably take around an hour to finish!!
